name: Ruflo Task Routing - Smart Complexity-Based Routing
description: Q-Learning router assesses complexity and routes to optimal tier (Booster/Medium/Complex)

inputs.task: Convert all var declarations to const in src/utils/*.ts files

steps: complexity-analysis (simple: var-to-const is a deterministic transform)
boost-check (eligible: var-to-const is a supported Agent Booster transform)
router-update (Q-value updated with reward=1.0 for successful boost)
